name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Your invitation to join our Tele-Town Hall with President Trump
body:
President Trump will be on our Tele-Town Hall tonight and I want you to join.
Peter,I have exciting news. Below is your invitation to join our Tele-Town Hall with **President Donald J. Trump.** The Tele-Town Hall is TONIGHT at 6:30pm CT - 7:30pm ET. [**You can RSVP here.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-y/) [RSVP FOR OUR TELE-TOWN HALL WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-j/) I'm honored to have President Trump's support and I'm grateful he's made the time to join our Tele-Town Hall.I hope you can join us too. [**RSVP here.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-t/) Thanks for your support.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdrjrht-fuutjhhtj-o/)
---|---|---|---

4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

name: James Taylor
subject: personally reaching out, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
Peter --
I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: [**can you chip in $5 to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump?**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

In just three years of Donald Trump's presidency, it feels like our government and America's place in the world has been hollowed out -- like a pumpkin on Halloween. The only difference is that there's no light in there.

Instead, the White House is occupied by a puffed-up, self-absorbed, all-hat-and-no-cattle cowboy.

I don't say this lightly, but it's become more and more clear that Donald Trump is an inept and corrupt narcissist. And rather than facing the challenge of leading America through a national crisis, he's refused to take responsibility and started lashing out at others.

We can't afford four more years of a man who cares more about his own power and celebrity than he does about the health and success of our country.

Joe Biden understands the concept of public service. It has been his life's commitment. Joe Biden hits the ground running. He comes to the White House with a full understanding of what the job of Chief Executive entails.

**Joe Biden is the kind of leader we need right now, Peter. That's why I'm not sitting out this election, and why I'm asking you to stay in this fight with me.**

[**If you can, will you make your first contribution today to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump? I know whatever you're able to give will make a real difference.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Peter, with Joe Biden in the White House, we'll finally be able to get back to the issues that really matter.

We can protect access to healthcare. We can recommit to combating climate change. We can reverse Trump's corruption of our government and start rebuilding our economy.

But we can't do any of that unless we beat Donald Trump in November.

[We can't afford to fall short right now, Peter. If you're with Joe and me in this fight to kick Donald Trump out of the White House, I hope you'll use this link to donate today:](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Donate**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

All my best,

James Taylor

_James Taylor is a multiple Grammy award-winning singer and songwriter. He has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Songwriters Hall of Fame and is the recipient of the National Medal of Arts and the Presidential Medal of Freedom. James Taylor supports Joe Biden for President._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7293/4187567313/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7292/4187567313/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7291/4187567313/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7290/4187567313/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728e/4187567313/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728d/4187567313/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728c/4187567313/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728b/4187567313/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728a/4187567313/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728d/4187567313/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7289/4187567313/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c728c/4187567313/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82b/1cd0ac28/8f8c87c3/357c7288/4187567313/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

PRESIDENT TRUMP + YOU FOR A VIRTUAL FUNDRAISER

Friend,

Ladies and gentlemen, we’re going virtual.

For the FIRST TIME EVER, President Trump is hosting a virtual fundraiser on July 21st with a handful of his TOP supporters, and he wants YOU to be there.

But, before the official fundraiser even begins, he’s requested to have a presidential video call with you to privately discuss his critical campaign strategy. As one of his most trusted allies, this should come as no surprise.

clean_body: | In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground – and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click . = | | Michael McCaul recently went on a Twitter-spree trying to paint our values and our movement as “extreme” — but I know TX-10 won’t fall for his lies: = This proves without a doubt that he’s scared — he knows our district is waking up to all the ways he’s ignored our struggles and betrayed our trust. So he’s trying to smear our policies —it’s desperate and transparent. But McCaul already has over a million in the bank — and if he’s attacking me this much a few days after I won the Democratic nomination, there’s no telling how far he’ll go with his millions. We have to make sure that we’re ready for anything. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Mike | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Friend,

While President Trump is busy fighting to protect your constitutional rights, Radical Democrats like Joe Biden are promising to take away your guns and defund the police.

In other words, they want to ABOLISH law enforcement and then trample over your right to self-defense. Rest assured that as long as President Trump is OUR President, that will NEVER happen.

It’s time for the American People to stand strong and defend our freedoms by sending a clear message to the Left that we will NEVER allow them to take our guns or do away with our great police.

The President has made it clear that he will ALWAYS fight for you, and now, he’s asking YOU to stand with him and do the same.

name: House DFL Team
subject: Urgent deadline
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?refcode=071820)
| | Friend, This weekend is a very big one for us: our next campaign finance deadline is this Monday. That means we need all hands on deck this weekend to reach our goal. [**_Would you make an investment in our campaign to protect and expand our majority today?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/S_Fv4gB4VF4eneO7ltXEMJgI-_KWLU9A_kibs7WxUwg=?refcode=071820) Here's what we're up against:
* Donald Trump came within striking distance of winning Minnesota four years ago and is investing big already this year.
* Minnesota Republicans continue to downplay the significance of the COVID-19 pandemic as cases continue to rise.
* Republicans in the Minnesota Senate voted to end Governor Walz's peacetime emergency and if Republicans had control of the House, they would have.

**Next weekend marks 100 days until the election.** We need to spend the next 100 days methodically working to keep our majority or Minnesota Republicans could flip the House. **Please consider making a contribution to our campaign today.** Don't forget: Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and it will be refunded to them by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=071820) [**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=071820) [**Contribute $75**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=071820) [**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=071820) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W70j0u8nSXKkpQFjn8q7FB2xMhx0Igu_95V9wM4QH4Q=/JODE2ckL1JU1S5_mRjSOc8Ysrd1DaUyuK2AI4kr7Df4=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=071820) Thank you for being an integral part of our team. Minnesota Republicans continue to downplay the significance of the COVID-19 pandemic as cases continue to rise. Republicans in the Minnesota Senate voted to end Governor Walz's peacetime emergency and if Republicans had control of the House, they would have. Next weekend marks 100 days until the election. We need to spend the next 100 days methodically working to keep our majority or Minnesota Republicans could flip the House. Please consider making a contribution to our campaign today. Don't forget: Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and it will be refunded to them by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Thank you for being an integral part of our team. House DFL Team | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. DFL House Caucus 255 E Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107 United States = = = We are prohibited from taking PAC and lobbyist contributions during the legislative session. If you are a PAC/lobbyist, please disregard this message.** If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between July 13, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on July 22, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) to attend a dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth Ave, New York, NY 10022. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
A ton of Texans are still undecided and we only have three months to reach them.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890119/7f51f7bc/4183badf/4ef65773/3008111088/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

Peter -- MJ is fired up and ready to take on Sen. Cornyn this November, **and early voting in the general election begins just three months from today!**

**If you've been waiting for the right time to give, NOW IS THE TIME! We 've set a goal of bringing 300 new donors on board by midnight tonight to mark our three months out goal. Will you pitch in to help us get there?**

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Peter, we need your help again to save the Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The president should be doing everything he can to support the Postal Service -- especially right now |
---
| Peter, 86 percent of respondents to our last USPS survey said it's VERY important that the next President is someone who supports the Postal Service and ensures they have adequate funding.
**We know it 's not the first time we've reached out for your help in saving the USPS, but Trump's attacks on the Postal Service keep coming.**
[This is too important to back down now, Peter. Will you go on record this month and stand with Joe Biden on prioritizing a STRONG Postal Service?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7286/3465829415/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/support-strong-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
| [ADD YOUR NAME >> ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7286/3465829415/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/support-strong-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Peter --

We warned back in April that there would be drastic changes to the Postal Service under Trump's newly appointed Postmaster General -- and it's even worse than we thought.

**New directives from the Postmaster General will use the USPS's financial crisis to slow down the mail, which could have devastating effects for Americans in rural communities across the country.**

The Postal Service is an essential American institution -- they handle billions of pieces of mail a year. And during this pandemic, people are relying on the USPS to receive essential packages containing things like medicine and groceries.

The President should be doing everything he can to support the Postal Service -- especially right now -- but, instead, he's using his new appointee to tear down the USPS from the inside. **We have to fight back.**

[We need 75,000 supporters to go on the record this month and stand with Joe in supporting a strong Postal Service. Peter, will you condemn these attacks and protect the postal service? Add your name here >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7286/3465829415/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/support-strong-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
[ADD YOUR NAME >> ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7286/3465829415/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/support-strong-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.18_B1_usps_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Thanks for using your voice to fight back today,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7285/3465829415/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7284/3465829415/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7283/3465829415/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7282/3465829415/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7281/3465829415/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c7280/3465829415/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737f/3465829415/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737e/3465829415/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737d/3465829415/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737c/3465829415/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737f/3465829415/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737b/3465829415/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737e/3465829415/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b83e/1cd0ac28/8fad1ed5/357c737a/3465829415/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852ef/1541544053/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

All of us on Team Warner hope that you are staying safe and healthy. Below is a wrap-up of what Senator Mark Warner is working on now, and planning for the coming weeks and months. Team Warner is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark is working on in the Senate.

**Here is just some of what Mark has been working on:**
* **[Mark joined Rep. Elaine Luria and a group of veterans and military families](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852ee/1541544053/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/military/sen-mark-warner-and-congresswoman-elaine-luria-hold-roundtable-discussion-with-military-families-veterans/")** for a virtual roundtable discussion of the challenges they face during coronavirus and beyond. Mark is committed to making sure that military families and veterans have adequate and affordable health care, including mental health resources, safe housing, and access to opportunities.

* After **[Twitter's security breach](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852ed/1541544053/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fortune.com/2020/07/16/twitter-hackers-didnt-access-user-passwords/")** this week, Mark called on the platform to release more information. Mark has a record of holding tech companies accountable, and said that "the ability of bad actors to take over prominent accounts, even fleetingly, signals a worrisome vulnerability in this media environment."

* **[Mark proposed an employee retention credit](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852ec/1541544053/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wvtf.org/post/senator-warner-wants-protect-workers-big-businesses#stream/0")** as part of coronavirus stimulus funding, which would incentivize businesses to keep employees on their payrolls, and prevent furloughed workers from losing health insurance benefits.

* Mark announced this week that he is working on a **[new bill to expand economic opportunity](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852eb/1541544053/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.whsv.com/2020/07/14/sen-warner-works-on-a-bill-to-expand-economic-opportunity-post-covid-19/")** in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, particularly for women-owned and Black and brown-owned businesses, to make sure that everyone has access to the federal grants and loans they need to financially recover.

* Mark discussed his **_[Accessible, Affordable Internet for All Act](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852ea/1541544053/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://farmvilleherald.com/2020/07/column-warner-discusses-100-billion-broadband-proposal/")_** , which would make a major investment in rural broadband nationwide. As we face a period of unprecedented demand for teleworking, distance learning, and telehealth, it's critical that we address the digital divide. More than 700,000 Virginians lack access to affordable, reliable broadband, and Mark is determined to make a change.

* Last week, Mark joined Senate colleagues to introduce the _1619 Act_ to increase awareness and access to African American history in our schools, with educational programs and training opportunities for teachers using resources from the National Museum of African American History and Culture. Black history needs to be recognized beyond the month of February, as an important part of history curriculums in our schools.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

P.S. It's never too early to start making your plan to vote! In Virginia, we have expanded options for how to vote. Regardless of whether you decide to vote with a no-excuse absentee ballot, vote early in-person, or vote in-person on Election Day, it's important to make sure you're registered. Check out the **[Citizen Portal from the Virginia Department of Elections](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852e9/1541544053/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.elections.virginia.gov/citizen-portal/")** to make sure you're registered.
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852e8/1541544053/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbdc/53d9897e/547b9edb/1c8852d7/1541544053/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

Check out the "" to make sure you're registered. | "" Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Kansans for Life Drops Watkins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
As the details emerge of Steve Watkins' growing scandals. | |
---
| | | Patriot,

As the details emerge of Steve Watkins' growing scandals, _**Kansas' premier pro-life advocacy organization announced it has rescinded its previous endorsement of Rep. Watkins.**_

In announcing their single endorsement of our campaign, KFL stated:
---
| | “Democrat Michelle De La Isla is well-financed and laser-focused on keeping the speaker’s gavel in pro-abortion Nancy Pelosi’s hands. Pro-life voters in Northeast and Southeast Kansas can best stand up for the preborn and their mothers by uniting behind Jake LaTurner this primary election.”
---
|
---
| This comes just one day after [Rep. Ron Estes's major endorsement](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3b0d8e363b&e=1050d051da). Our momentum grows everyday and I am humbled by Kansans for Life’s confidence in our campaign.

Will you make a [generous contribution ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a33335c570&e=1050d051da)[today](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=51d8642b91&e=1050d051da) as we finish the last two weeks on television, radio and the mail?

We need your support today!

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
---
| [Donate Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2f5d1471ca&e=1050d051da "Donate Now!")

| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner

Friend,

I need your help.

But first, I want to thank my good friend, Brad Parscale, who has been with our team for a very long time and has led our movement to be BIGGER and BETTER than ever before. I trust Brad to the fullest extent and I am looking forward to working with him in his new role.

These next few months will be unlike any other. Your President is in an all-out political WAR. It’s going to take all hands on deck to make sure we WIN BIG, which is why I am pleased to let you know that Bill Stepien has joined us as our new campaign manager.

Both of these great Patriots played a huge role in our historic 2016 win, and I look forward to having this very important SECOND WIN with them by my side.

I am committed to FIGHTING for you every single day, but I can’t do it alone. The 2020 Election will go down as the MOST IMPORTANT Election in the history of the United States, and I need your help.

The Democrats are getting more deranged by the day, which is why I need the advice of a few respected Republican leaders, like YOU, to help shape our critical campaign strategy for the next few months.

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Calling on Men to Stand Together
body:
| | Exciting news from our partner Promise Keepers
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqPgksKvhI946JGRA8zK_3KcxfGw7PWq1dyF-_bEims1jfhI8rUopPI_lWrb2AvBbQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=1)
| Peter, My Faith Votes is excited to partner with [Promise Keepers.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqFVUYqshukRdm1092zcD_h4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=2) Founded in 1990 by Coach Bill McCartney, Promise Keepers has impacted the lives of millions of men. Today, the ministry is under new leadership and has a renewed vision to bring revival and transformation in our nation. More than ever, America needs a revival of godly men. Our nation faces problems that can only be overcome when men of integrity \-- promise-keeping men -- boldly rise and stand together. **_On July 31 and August 1_** , men all across the globe are invited to gather via livestream in their homes, with their men’s groups, and at simulcast locations hosted by churches, to be a part of the [Promise Keepers 2020 Global Digital Experience.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqPgksKvhI946JGRA8zK_3KcxfGw7PWq1dyF-_bEims1jfhI8rUopPI_lWrb2AvBbQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=3) This 2-day event will feature a Christ-centered experience with amazing keynote speakers, worship artists, and special guests - all selected to offer a timely message of hope, unity, and transformation directly to the heart of men. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqPgksKvhI946JGRA8zK_3KcxfGw7PWq1dyF-_bEims1jfhI8rUopPI_lWrb2AvBbQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=4) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqI_Z_dZH5I0ARM0JwKr1eArKoHqGwtT16FnoRN_2Irzg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=5) Mark your calendar and gather your brothers, your neighbors, your fathers, your sons, and join with men from all around the world for a powerful time at the Promise Keepers 2020 Global Digital Experience. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=wT-ngiKf7d6gKNa4INTeqPgksKvhI946JGRA8zK_3KcxfGw7PWq1dyF-_bEims1jfhI8rUopPI_lWrb2AvBbQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=6) **United. We Stand.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=7) P.S. Forward this email to encourage others to join in as well!
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=8)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=12) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200718com01&n=13)

| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=667283bd28&e=66979298f9)
---
| **_Glenda perfectly embodies our PAC's values_**
Together we can show up for her campaign and ensure that she has the volunteer support she needs to cross the finish line this August.
[From Glenda:](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=af7f07ab98&e=66979298f9) "My family has lived on the waters of Washington state for thousands of years and it is in my lifeblood to protect these living beings. For my people, the natural laws of the land have been passed down through what we call captikwł. Through captikwł, our Syilx/Okanagan people learn about our responsibilities to the water and land. To our people, to our nation, to our Indigenous relatives all over these beautiful lands, water is life. I am committed to reflecting this profound respect for the environment shared by my tribal community and the 22nd District as an elected official, and combating climate change is my utmost priority.
---
|
---
|
---
|

---
| |
---
As the National Campaigns Director I am wholeheartedly committed to serving as an ally to my Indigenous leadership and ensuring that all of our candidates get the support they deserve. I am honored to serve in this role and hope you will join me in showing up for the inspiring candidates our PAC is supporting.

Chiara D'Angelo

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Beaches, Businesses, and the Future
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This was our first week holding only one press conference a week. If you weren't able to catch it on Wednesday afternoon, don't worry.There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week. I'll still be sending out these emails every day so that you can get the most recent info when you need it. If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gfIVTMtnjQBXsc-063nd65P76s_NiKf6kVhqukN4Z9VAddzIC2d5xSRDcFdwfIXfsl7Ir0Jfx8S_vNOxlnuMgoapU2RZz95HdlfUSNUMOqmn0EMnG4nCaBgUGcSEobRu3JMExAqcI-J7k_OjXUmLAn4cpzPg8zTzwvj-9thXbGarTRm5J3vuQIiJNSEcZ-XoaIXojt64tg6eefSfXw3Se5pWBOCqJvioYpz_r8Bh8DSqG4RR7nefu14vitY_ctmi-j1LXUVVAgVUFmbtYuocS88Din6dul3C7TKrv9t9DNNL98t9SXNuiDnZ4Lq4Su4p74Bfzk0WiHnaw5Db6hMR-OELEA56EzmzSoPJwiO8bEHpj1XFnC-Uwve7ET474JqPFGSv2SqkLazw4Ds4AStJjOiWExKHVlm9wBfkKnhWn40ftICvQ8kInCdEGvn0MuuLrdLopRXvaSmSvRU0EVVdgx6HAgLOVITNUoJVTg-eQG8I9Bkba09cT23sbuS7ZY7X-ld5hoKJcLJPTPbvhTNbg8wESb58G8az-MXZJs8TIYnKDAuHNflufjGLPVC5UwHxsZnvb3Kd0U4qvS2OLukAxsDuy3pZahaMw8S_fsSIeTm5Nlzs-ynJTQgUuOfTiJisS9oH49GV6sE=&c=iL1uttH_wjXXKFrbCgUmMfRcUrhKMQV5ZwMvL6JA6RlHPy_97mJ3LQ==&ch=RzS_vAbrlf9Z9X7uhHEF4q_igsWKfFFuOxSe1ftIllZYuyXx1ozRfA==). The better we stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
BEACHES

Effective this past Thursday, parking lots at Misquamicut and Scarborough State Beaches will be reduced to 25% capacity to reduce the volume of visitors. I'm sorry that we have to do this, but it's necessary. Crowding at our beaches last weekend was the worst we've seen it since this crisis began, and that spilled over into crowding at local restaurants and bars. If we want to stay open, we need to stay safe.
We'll be working with municipalities to crack down on illegal parking around our beaches and we'll increase enforcement at local businesses. We'll also have staff on the beaches to hand out masks to folks who don't have them. If we start to see these same issues at other beaches, we'll put restrictions on them too. If we continue to see issues, we'll close our state beach parking lots entirely.
| | |
---|---
|
RESTORE RI
We're supporting Rhode Island small businesses with a new program called Restore RI, through which we will directly invest $100 million. $50 million of this money will be made available in grants of up to $15,000 as part of the first round of funding to provide direct cash assistance. These funds will help businesses facing reopening expenses such as plexiglass, cleaning supplies, and touchless pay technology, as well as fixed costs like rent and utilities. Yesterday I had[ a video conference with our congressional delegation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gfIVTMtnjQBXsc-063nd65P76s_NiKf6kVhqukN4Z9VAddzIC2d5xSRDcFdwfIXf6F6CqDaFKllnQQpYc4bCqJP45QjsTDC-IThBTet-bpTo9nVCzr7hHuLedcCl5ksGhEXzU8jSGtHypKGvq_Ucq76HrakTqZ4-RnARG10u-2xUQ8D-Ush1ApukzRE65ScjhxidywArFNq2UnCvJpPfedyQyZa6WV4wERfSdAm6oCbk4WrZk6_UWvWv8P07At8GMRThGQzyawUfxeVlwByDJj7n0Lv2VFYJj289imZvfb9oYvti4NaJCAiIsrIx2z91M-tWWRFoRhoXLtr9j4Up67svJ1hphe3NaeViIOkzrp7iv2vfIAj9SnBQAjCw6zRnJLJZLdJWJqgjMdODcHrVj6ZW7mndUr3cfNt5qyd86-JkRwcEvYkVeAiUlVezJIyRo6jcXNngtlGIfeY_Io-WKaZA1Omjzj41dkJakCT5eflI-Dqcau4ABCA8zdwbab1LfitnugwmyEtWETdd24qs1g==&c=iL1uttH_wjXXKFrbCgUmMfRcUrhKMQV5ZwMvL6JA6RlHPy_97mJ3LQ==&ch=RzS_vAbrlf9Z9X7uhHEF4q_igsWKfFFuOxSe1ftIllZYuyXx1ozRfA==) to talk about how CARES Act funding will power this important program.
That money will both help business stay open and keep employees and customers safe. It is essential that this money reaches businesses in every part of the state as quickly as possible. Our team at Commerce is working around the clock to be able to make applications available in the next two weeks and to get you all the info you need to take part in Restore RI. If your businesses needs this support, you can prepare to apply by reviewing the details on [CommerceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gfIVTMtnjQBXsc-063nd65P76s_NiKf6kVhqukN4Z9VAddzIC2d5xX4wLWWARa-mxRx5trLsnGc5TVoz4L8ZZ-FbXG2Vk2Ws2uRwwr6c0hBGGgEFTcLRKxUtV6PGCLASCKxHucjI0-KwRRAlmYvL_5vRP4Vl9GOt6Y33PKhBfhUAnJxrmYQixzwttBT08RQAb9Dp4z9z5PbYV_XVcmFme6pW6k6706NRZ2thQH1xV_ccAtZdalGz5-09OoXVkS8VYKeHp22yzKXIqMbIHfAyxcBMVCQox3cPjzlaVryeOkzVyWer2Wv0i8sqysU0qxBp0XrfB2AW-nIbmubBDzpKcsBRKEoqyIwJ-Cqi9vh6JFiIKRe9tqrMN9M-6XjmuO0JpYs8aCtM-bDFfKto0IWSyspgXi0IUzSLtWD40Z_8hGWAgISzt9TvYAYBD9GwAjHZioc70TIDZQYwz5zzmjkwxuHTwMqsCtqlklifkinQniRtHXjB_deJ_7DPqa_nau-P&c=iL1uttH_wjXXKFrbCgUmMfRcUrhKMQV5ZwMvL6JA6RlHPy_97mJ3LQ==&ch=RzS_vAbrlf9Z9X7uhHEF4q_igsWKfFFuOxSe1ftIllZYuyXx1ozRfA==) or by calling 521-HELP.
| | |
---|---
|
REBUILDING RHODE ISLAND

This week, I shared [my vision for rebuilding Rhode Island's economy](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gfIVTMtnjQBXsc-063nd65P76s_NiKf6kVhqukN4Z9VAddzIC2d5xSRDcFdwfIXfDGngbbHkL9kHmawjOpxPd45vLzvMjic3rsOuTVNLlHZvWiXn_6EGNn-X6vShF3338sKmSQJYP6FbMdG1dqHrCVvQMrdHwNfqS8RYMSa83ttWqKBpezSJTluVMlezx8v3PEG9HHaeb7HfPL-VhlTzun_e2aBa_G4MrmCdmp4NmSiz73c0osdWBccRF5977A8VAjfLQ3Z6ukv7QtkYoW9TocE3M4SsseJRQGJ4AvKgVpSYDInE_2RIPuy3dt_zOCO65K-X5_ffwATFrWClnNxq4F0oTFwD3jaB-81DBj2ulVWy5TvGLJw-Jj5MrxSCIzB_Ugop3VjcRLg5g7kU3mDKZ39wmnsPoI3Mf6NGa7D3gmnPc21_zqGtzT-wQM2hR432BKzu-lrQcyPzFKAmi2MScqG3Y0H-YG0hi1RVidx9PNwM7s32byXWRYCVwbw9JzfghRGUGUfqy2MEFQIAAGLssvzyDRjGi3r2j0N1253rw0WLkOY6YSonrCDQK67Sj9EBt45ZKULJ4w8WBKQIFtpF6bXr6HYi9E-EwW5C61cEUxFHh5Qp7Edg7UZMa5CLwfwQbMpIniz3r1YBpcEQVWg9FOn_sB_3dq4NZtIP_3vn0l-iUd8fcGz3qye-HVm7mHLiuEhz4R4inVEa5t-9v6H0g6kjZOiVy767CmG8oB4RarxfrBQ7YIAyPUD83EGqRXCcropeEXKlz0lx_qfZZFFJv015G1KpOS8j4yZ7DcqWjckdXcw1LsEf4ykWyrGhzwbTD8_YLbun1C6HcpXoMUkMTQS6O2QTgDC6EaA2RFL4bNL4rSCVDGJI7mh6lci50N0YkRcxQz7tmgLeTZvZAbPCcLQ_w3_F2YASUEPfYsuU8KXm8npkA0EPTwqQoYkyQxSlNTl-JLKjpUZLqNN_1s_YoV_oibDl2mxCs2tPUOAFBSzXhJF17OkmdCUAM9uBWgyV4wjxcbyVfdU=&c=iL1uttH_wjXXKFrbCgUmMfRcUrhKMQV5ZwMvL6JA6RlHPy_97mJ3LQ==&ch=RzS_vAbrlf9Z9X7uhHEF4q_igsWKfFFuOxSe1ftIllZYuyXx1ozRfA==) after the COVID-19 pandemic. We need to embrace what we've learned, and not just go back to the old way of doing business. The fundamental makeup of our economy has changed. We can't shy away from the hard truth that a lot of the jobs we've lost aren't coming back.
But there's another truth that we can't turn a blind eye to either: the old way of doing business left a lot of people behind. Let's address these inequities head-on, together. Let's build a better, more equitable, more innovative economy. That requires making major investments in education, job training, small businesses, and housing. I'm excited to announce that I'll be dedicating more than $200 million in federal stimulus funding to support these programs.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gfIVTMtnjQBXsc-063nd65P76s_NiKf6kVhqukN4Z9VAddzIC2d5xSRDcFdwfIXfyoIHV4-blSorrGuA-EjIO7AXNH8Y33ep3gSsrzNvERUJ5qo_LIUpRcodKApb-myrCsPMQEbAJaxQuQcD5TONNexpis7UIRNCfStKXmc9ANUyooyn73isU-EZFx-bh44J1YQA1MpJQze4giRvwiiXv1QEq1GNTPBV43KRmr41rVjDnSTM3A0Dki2EYxG7ftCLiJjlck0CWVzAjIrjiL2WXpCuwmzswQBp_zWcvd5FM4Oring1bp4g4AMoOIJuF-zMEZEdEHe8UNv55aMeTQwZxZsF-iEkSRpkxSMg_0nv2-ufuTRndWqtiAyd_0MBBrJWXVBk3GyzaHaoffml1TkjiGVGvJSuWJdmH4gCbaI6umqPgo3V0OMGhaLndx-KyQnp&c=iL1uttH_wjXXKFrbCgUmMfRcUrhKMQV5ZwMvL6JA6RlHPy_97mJ3LQ==&ch=RzS_vAbrlf9Z9X7uhHEF4q_igsWKfFFuOxSe1ftIllZYuyXx1ozRfA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d234dd39-38c1-4834-bed4-77d150b81984)

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Harris?=
subject: Radical Rita
body:
| | | |
---
| Team,

Rita Hart continues to embrace the radical agenda of Nancy Pelosi and AOC. We need a representative that will work with President Trump to pass legislation that puts Iowa first. You will not get that with radical Rita Hart.

For far too long we have dealt with feckless representation from Dave Loebsack and Rita Hart has proven that she will be no different. It's time we elect a true leader like Mariannette Miller-Meeks to the U.S. House. In Congress, Mariannette will stand up to the corrupt Democrats and fight for issues important to Iowans like: rebuilding our economy, reforming health care, and supporting our veterans.

Will you chip in today to elect a true leader to the U.S. House? [Click here to contribute $10, $20, $30, $40 or $50](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=8e6212c157&e=16fac31a0f)!

With your help **we will reopen America to the future!**

Sincerely,

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager

name: Joe Biden
subject: John Lewis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
|
---
We are made in the image of God, and then there is John Lewis.

How could someone in flesh and blood be so courageous, so full of hope and love in the face of so much hate, violence, and vengeance? Perhaps it was the Spirit that found John as a young boy in the Deep South dreaming of preaching the social gospel; the work ethic his sharecropper parents instilled in him and that stayed with him; the convictions of nonviolent civil disobedience he mastered from Dr. King and countless fearless leaders in the movement; or the abiding connection with the constituents of Georgia's 5th District he loyally served for decades.

Or perhaps it was that he was truly a one-of-a-kind, a moral compass who always knew where to point us and which direction to march.

It is rare to meet and befriend our heroes. John was that hero for so many people of every race and station, including us. He absorbed the force of human nature's cruelty during the course of his life, and the only thing that could finally stop him was cancer. But he was not bitter. We spoke to him a few days ago for the final time. His voice still commanded respect and his laugh was still full of joy. Instead of answering our concerns for him, he asked about us. He asked us to stay focused on the work left undone to heal this nation. He was himself - a man at peace, of dignity, grace and character.

John's life reminds us that the most powerful symbol of what it means to be an American is what we do with the time we have to make real the promise of our nation - that we are all created equal and deserve to be treated equally. Through the beatings, the marches, the arrests, the debates on war, peace, and freedom, and the legislative fights for good jobs and health care and the fundamental right to vote, he taught us that while the journey toward equality is not easy, we must be unafraid and never cower and never, ever give up.

That is the charge a great American and humble man of God has left us. For parents trying to answer their children's questions about what to make of the world we are in today, teach them about John Lewis. For the peaceful marchers for racial and economic justice around the world who are asking where we go from here, follow his lead. For his fellow legislators, govern by your conscience like he did, not for power or party. He was our bridge - to our history so we did not forget its pain and to our future so we never lose our hope.

To John's son, John Miles, and to his family, friends, staff, and constituents, we send you our love and prayers. Thank you for sharing him with the nation and the world.

And to John, march on, dear friend. May God bless you. May you reunite with your beloved Lillian. And may you continue to inspire righteous good trouble down from the Heavens.

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b835/1cd0ac28/8fdb7f55/357c7e77/4079163012/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b835/1cd0ac28/8fdb7f55/357c7e76/4079163012/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b835/1cd0ac28/8fdb7f55/357c7e75/4079163012/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b835/1cd0ac28/8fdb7f55/357c7e74/4079163012/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

clean_body: | We are made in the image of God, and then there is John Lewis. How could someone in flesh and blood be so courageous, so full of hope and love in the face of so much hate, violence, and vengeance? Perhaps it was the Spirit that found John as a young boy in the Deep South dreaming of preaching the social gospel; the work ethic his sharecropper parents instilled in him and that stayed with him; the convictions of nonviolent civil disobedience he mastered from Dr. King and countless fearless leaders in the movement; or the abiding connection with the constituents of Georgia's 5th District he loyally served for decades. Or perhaps it was that he was truly a one-of-a-kind, a moral compass who always knew where to point us and which direction to march. It is rare to meet and befriend our heroes. John was that hero for so many people of every race and station, including us. He absorbed the force of human nature's cruelty during the course of his life, and the only thing that could finally stop him was cancer. But he was not bitter. Friend,

Did you see the breaking news out of Chicago today?

**Federal prosecutors implicated both Illinois House Speaker Mike Madigan and Governor Pritzker in sweeping investigations related to bribery, fraud, and corruption charges.**

Sadly, this is just the latest chapter in the long story of Illinois’ corrupt politics and yet another embarrassment to our state’s political image.

_However, this is also an opportunity for us to take a hard look at how we got here, and how we can turn this moment into positive change for the future of Illinois._

**Illinoisans deserve better than the constant abuses of power we read about in the news coming from our state’s Democratic Party – and we have the chance to change that on November 3rd.**

**_Will you stand with me today against the corruption we’re seeing by chipping in any amount to usher in a new generation of leadership for Illinois this November?_**
[**HELP ME RESTORE PRINCIPLED,**
**CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP TO ILLINOIS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=551c2b130f60422ca0bad1b38939baa8&_e=C5G8KDyJEi_S1eiPC1BZ9GYv-cEWLFlDAYjOQC5mgWBVz6Xrvsqmal2jftY7179M-AeToszMkcL-74dWUl3d4FAF1X9tMjd5FFcILCOKV6nv8-K4K5P4a57julJwZ_pphuTdglqix0nfnwhC6JTJOREJLdL-c0j_ehwoSmZlr3JO8fp4u5WecCa9WbNjmVytq0o8FQWuWyXbc4zjwL51xLkI2_pBHlW3b6FngN4smhGpCrfP_6S2hZaqz7D0wn7c9pr9SiSdFXYV_3nj_4vQ5u72XD___ghwOOXovK3eaqYv9oQzs868RIzMRfppeiMeRZImcZWsaBqPehBRsLo43UHdgKsOO9V7Sz5rD-2p6w5oQ1oMURGj6_1zhpEWd2B66W-xDL6qkEh8eGd8ZkHFbQGCbq83ILp_pLZRZPZ_rPlVqNP37AKr3a0isytF8BwbiE1JvP01qDgaJbEsJmynHxRblUr9ykD4tbDl9QI5ZCo%3D)
As a former federal prosecutor, these federal investigations are a step in the right direction – but we still need to do our part to root out the corrupt career politicians ruining our state.

**That starts with mobilizing voters at the ballot box to vote for principled, conservative leaders who can turn Illinois around and restore transparency to our state’s political system.**

Friend, will you join me today by chipping in any amount to support a new generation of leadership for Illinois while putting an end to the corrupt political circus that Democrats have been running for years?
[**HELP ME RESTORE PRINCIPLED,**
**CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP TO ILLINOIS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=551c2b130f60422ca0bad1b38939baa8&_e=C5G8KDyJEi_S1eiPC1BZ9GYv-cEWLFlDAYjOQC5mgWBVz6Xrvsqmal2jftY7179M-AeToszMkcL-74dWUl3d4FAF1X9tMjd5FFcILCOKV6nv8-K4K5P4a57julJwZ_pphuTdglqix0nfnwhC6JTJOREJLdL-c0j_ehwoSmZlr3JO8fp4u5WecCa9WbNjmVytq0o8FQWuWyXbc4zjwL51xLkI2_pBHlW3b6FngN4smhGpCrfP_6S2hZaqz7D0wn7c9pr9SiSdFXYV_3nj_4vQ5gU39JM8NhMLI6ye442YciZ55cQWcwP4MHjE8y5ce5MY7I2W1zwE5hsh8xnWpUyXI3BWZfNIBxzyJkxjIkeU37HfQNuHE-d_iISXVTDwZo_oQBEGP_WDfDYh51ap7TuyhKNxiwBF2oj4WwlXoMseWuT__tbWU8G-eZOxFpGTrUBfYLWTO8bXx9votbSughrpBqfX1-So9kAUzlg5J5pSUqI%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18313234/224252324/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2YzFmMC0zNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9Ksqt2LRY9LOrqQsn6YHVfRniiiuWpB2wc6ztqcCjw=&emci=ad5043fe-fa0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=00c6c1f0-35c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Dear friend, After months of careful consideration and thinking about what the people of Mississippi deserve from their leaders in Washington, I have made my decision: **I’m officially running to be the next United States Senator from Mississippi.** We are going up against the all-powerful GOP machine as we take on Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith and her extreme agenda. The last time I ran against her was in 2018 — it was the closest U.S. Senate election in Mississippi since 1982. **It’s going to take a groundswell of grassroots support to put us over the edge this time and win.** [**Before I get into the ins and outs of why I’m running, let me cut to the chase: we are building a people-powered movement to move Mississippi forward, and I need you on the team. Add your name to join our campaign on day one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18313235/224252325/-1253678351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2YzFmMC0zNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9Ksqt2LRY9LOrqQsn6YHVfRniiiuWpB2wc6ztqcCjw=&emci=ad5043fe-fa0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=00c6c1f0-35c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611) | | [I'M IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18313236/224252326/-1253678351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2YzFmMC0zNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9Ksqt2LRY9LOrqQsn6YHVfRniiiuWpB2wc6ztqcCjw=&emci=ad5043fe-fa0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=00c6c1f0-35c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
Mississippi has changed quite a bit in the last few years, friend. Still, too many people can’t find a decent job. Rural hospitals across our state are closing. And the price for education is just too damn high. I'm running for U.S. Senate to change that and move Mississippi forward.
Meanwhile, Washington is a mess, and Senator Hyde-Smith has done little to truly help the Magnolia State. It feels like each day brings a new crisis that dominates the headlines but does nothing to create jobs or improve our communities. Too often, our current Senator puts party over country instead of doing what’s best for our state and even our national security.
**I’ll tell you what: with your support, I can and will do a better job for the people of Mississippi and the United States.**
_I won’t get bogged down in partisan politics._ Instead, I’ll work with anyone on both sides of the aisle to do what’s right by the people. And at the end of the day, as a former member of Congress, Secretary of Agriculture, and executive member of multiple non-profit organizations, I have years of public service experience — making me the most qualified candidate to get the job done.
Together, we can lift Mississippi families out of poverty, bring in more good-paying jobs, send each of our kids to quality public schools, support our farmers by ending the trade war with China, and make healthcare more affordable and accessible so that no one has to choose between putting food on the table or paying their medical bills.
[**I believe the people of Mississippi deserve better, friend. If you do too, add your name to stand with me in this campaign and help us turn the tide in 2020.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18313237/224252327/-1253678351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2YzFmMC0zNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9Ksqt2LRY9LOrqQsn6YHVfRniiiuWpB2wc6ztqcCjw=&emci=ad5043fe-fa0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=00c6c1f0-35c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
| [I'M IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18313238/224252328/-1253678351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2YzFmMC0zNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9Ksqt2LRY9LOrqQsn6YHVfRniiiuWpB2wc6ztqcCjw=&emci=ad5043fe-fa0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=00c6c1f0-35c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
This campaign isn’t about one person or one party. It’s about all of us rising up to fight for what’s best for our great state and our country. Let’s get to work.

clean_body: | Dear friend, After months of careful consideration and thinking about what the people of Mississippi deserve from their leaders in Washington, I have made my decision: I’m officially running to be the next United States Senator from Mississippi. We are going up against the all-powerful GOP machine as we take on Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith and her extreme agenda. The last time I ran against her was in 2018 — it was the closest U.S. Senate election in Mississippi since 1982. It’s going to take a groundswell of grassroots support to put us over the edge this time and win. | | Mississippi has changed quite a bit in the last few years, friend. Still, too many people can’t find a decent job. Rural hospitals across our state are closing. And the price for education is just too damn high. I'm running for U.S. Senate to change that and move Mississippi forward. Meanwhile, Washington is a mess, and Senator Hyde-Smith has done little to truly help the Magnolia State. It feels like each day brings a new crisis that dominates the headlines but does nothing to create jobs or improve our communities. Too often, our current Senator puts party over country instead of doing what’s best for our state and even our national security. I’ll tell you what: with your support, I can and will do a better job for the people of Mississippi and the United States. I won’t get bogged down in partisan politics. Instead, I’ll work with anyone on both sides of the aisle to do what’s right by the people. And at the end of the day, as a former member of Congress, Secretary of Agriculture, and executive member of multiple non-profit organizations, I have years of public service experience — making me the most qualified candidate to get the job done. Together, we can lift Mississippi families out of poverty, bring in more good-paying jobs, send each of our kids to quality public schools, support our farmers by ending the trade war with China, and make healthcare more affordable and accessible so that no one has to choose between putting food on the table or paying their medical bills. | This campaign isn’t about one person or one party. It’s about all of us rising up to fight for what’s best for our great state and our country. Let’s get to work. Thank you, Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

Hoosier Republican,

Democrats are trying to challenge our Republicans supermajority in the Indiana General Assembly, and we must fight back to keep that from happening.

We’ve seen what happens in Democrat-run cities in America — not to mention Congress with Nancy Pelosi in charge — and it is absolute chaos.

And we certainly haven’t forgotten about the days of debt, dysfunction, and walkouts when they were in charge here at home.

We can’t let them take over our state!

Under Republican leadership, together we’ve made Indiana a home to eight straight balanced budgets, a AAA credit rating, and a government that focuses on serving taxpayers efficiently. We absolutely cannot let the liberals take over.

Will you chip in what you can now so that we can help Republican candidates across our great state win BIG in November, and keep the leftists out of the Statehouse?

We can get through this as a state and a country. Indiana is leading the way and is poised to get back on track quicker than many other states because of the groundwork and leadership of Governor Holcomb and the Republicans in the Indiana General Assembly.

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Betsy DeVos is putting our children’s lives at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Friend,

Earlier this week the White House sent out a clear message on their stance when it comes to keeping our children safe this fall: “Science should not stand in the way of schools reopening.”

This is outrageous, friend . However, it’s not surprising.

In the middle of a pandemic, our leaders are continuing to make up their own facts and realities -- and we can’t let them get away with it.
That’s why I’m calling on Congress to put forth measures that put children first and actively reject the Trump Administration’s dangerous message, and I’m hoping you’ll add your name next to mine.

Sign the petition ➜ https://secure.ngpvan.com/IyVkfgus5kC18QoSuemPuA2

Here’s the truth:
According to studies, at least one out of every four teachers in the country are at risk of getting seriously ill from COVID, and over three million households with a family member over the age of 65 also has a school-age child living with them.
In short, if we reopen schools too early, we’re not only risking the lives of our children, but their more vulnerable elderly family members as well.

This is a blatant rejection of public health in favor of politics, and people will die because of it.

The Trump Administration and their DC special interest buddies may be ignoring the coronavirus pandemic, but our essential workers and our health care experts can’t. We’re setting a record number of cases in July, and it’s not projected to get better.

As states like Texas and Florida become the new epicenters of the pandemic, it is the responsibility of our leaders to advocate for us -- not risk our lives as part of a political charade to downplay this pandemic.

I’m stepping up and demanding that our leaders put our children first and listen to the advice of health experts. Let’s let science and facts guide us on how we educate our children during this pandemic -- plain and simple. Add your name if you agree.

Sign the petition ➜ https://secure.ngpvan.com/IyVkfgus5kC18QoSuemPuA2

Thank you,
--Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.18_spk_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e47a4c11-63c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/8f75c299-48c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Zjc1YzI5OS00OGM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxR1hYrCutMWWu9-jyVwBknnQRKBg3K5dLFOhd-dCuE=&id=117373579 .

body:

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baa8/29776869/91cfb08/569ef099/846976987/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTdfS0VHaW52aXRlLXMyIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy_kgparty?refcode=em20_200717_KEGinvite-s2")

subject: #TeamDani supporter housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9a771ca17ce2/teamdani-supporter-housing?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, #TeamDani!

As we enter the final stretch of this campaign we need to expand our field team. In order to do this, we need your help!

We are in urgent need of housing for our new staff members. **If you have a spare bedroom you can lend to a #TeamDani staffer we’d really appreciate it.** These staffers will work long hours to help us win this election.

This election cycle has the potential to be one of the most positive cycles in our lifetimes and we will need all the help we can get to ensure that we take full advantage of every opportunity we have to yield the best results possible for our campaign.

If you can host one of our organizers at your home through the election, we would be incredibly grateful. **If you have a spare room and are interested in hosting one of our staffers, please reach out to me at contact@daniforillinois.com and let me know!**

Thank you for your tremendous support, and for being in this fight with us. When we win this election, it will be because of YOU!

David McCarver
Campaign Manager
#TeamDani

name: Carole King
subject: I get a lot of emails from the Biden campaign too. Here's why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Why do they keep asking? |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
As a Biden supporter and an online donor, I've been getting a lot of emails from the Biden campaign.

At first I thought, I've already donated. Why do they keep asking?
Then I remember what's at stake, and I donate again.

The campaign to elect Joe Biden is more than a campaign. It's a strong, vibrant movement that I'm proud to be part of.

I know that individuals and families are struggling to get through this historically difficult time of multiple crises. But I also know that President Joe Biden, God willing, will make things less difficult.

If you can give $5, or even one dollar, for each of the next few months until the election, you, too, will be a part of this growing movement.

The headlines on July 2nd told us that Biden outraised Trump in May and June.

[Will you donate today to help Joe Biden outraise Trump in July?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

With your help and your vote, Joe Biden will win DECISIVELY in November!

As you deal with the consequences of the failure of this woefully incompetent president to lead, please know that we're all pulling for you and your loved ones.

Thank you for all you do.

-Carole

_Carole King is a Grammy-winning singer and songwriter who supports Joe Biden for President. And she did actually write this email._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7909/1068885265/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7908/1068885265/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7907/1068885265/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7906/1068885265/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7905/1068885265/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7904/1068885265/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7903/1068885265/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7902/1068885265/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7901/1068885265/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7900/1068885265/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7903/1068885265/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c79ff/1068885265/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c7902/1068885265/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b831/1cd0ac28/8ff14876/357c79fe/1068885265/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

And she did actually write this email. | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: John Lewis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Last night, the world lost a giant.
| | |
---
Friend,

Last night, the world lost a giant. I lost a mentor, a church member and a friend.
In his youth, John Lewis wrestled with a call to ministry. But instead of preaching sermons, he became a sermon for all the world to see. He was a walking, living sermon about love, truth-telling and justice-making on the earth.
John Lewis summoned the best within us while standing on a bridge in Selma with faith and courage. As his pastor, I was honored to be with him as he crossed his final bridge with the same faith and courage.
The hero of Bloody Sunday fought for our voice and our vote. For that he will be kindly remembered by history, his deeds etched in eternity. Our lives are richer and better because John Lewis passed our way.
- Reverend Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| | You may have seen some nonsense on television and in the mailbox from Dr. Bill Clifford’s campaign. Want to know why that is good news? **It means Bill Clifford’s campaign has polling data that shows our campaign maintains a strong lead in this race!** This matches the polling from our campaign. This morning we released a [new ad](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=8022e9e05b&e=a9d1410029) highlighting Bill’s tax and spend record. Multiple votes to raise property taxes and a sales tax increase are just the start. _Bill Clifford voted repeatedly to continue** the mandatory** **stay at home order and** **mandatory business closures** , even after Democrat Laura Kelly lifted them!_ We’ve received countless phone calls and emails from residents in Finney County furious with his votes. And we think the voters of the Big First deserve to know what kind of votes Bill would take in Congress. Audrey and I love our state and our country. We know that Kansas and the Big First District must be a guiding light to a country that seems to have lost its way. The stakes have never seemed higher. And now is the time for good people like you and me to step up. Thank you for standing with us. This campaign and this country are worth the fight. All my best,
---
|
---
| Tracey
